title: U.S. government restricts access to OpenAI's new AI model
abstract: U.S. government restricts access to OpenAI's new AI model may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform ge...
abstract_zh: 美国政府给新模型OpenAI关了门，说是 niche 就是 niche 吧，但人家解决问题时那叫一个精准！就像是特工手中的微型手枪，专治各种疑难杂症。在这变幻莫测的AI世界里，谁还没点小秘密呢？
